jobs.prompt: Editorial illustration on warm cream parchment background: long strings of smooth wooden and terracotta beads flowing in parallel horizontal rows like necklaces, one bead glowing terracotta as a focal point; below, neat vertical columns of stacked circular counters of increasing height suggest carrying digits in long arithmetic, one column overflowing with a small arc of beads carrying over to the next column. Purely abstract geometric shapes. Absolutely no text, no letters, no digits, no numerals, no handwriting, no symbols of any kind. Deep ink outlines, dusty blue and terracotta accents, generous negative space, quiet premium academic atmosphere.
